prompt: Match the character's pose and sword-holding style in the source image to that of the reference character.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Re-pose the character and adjust their sword-holding style to precisely match the posture and over-the-shoulder weapon stance of the character in image 2. The sword in image 1 should be positioned over the character's left shoulder, replicating the manner shown in image 2.
objects: Character (from image 1) in a posture replicating image 2
Sword (from image 1) positioned over the character's left shoulder, replicating image 2's stance
Cloudy sky with a glowing golden tree/light beam
